domain_context: Enterprise SaaS / IT Audit Command Center for CIOs
design_principles: Objective, rigid, and functional over decorative.
High-density data visualization ('Control Room' grid layout) to reduce scrolling and maximize visibility.
Color is used exclusively for functional state (risk, success, warning), not decoration.
Strict 1px borders and sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none) to enforce an authoritative, 'Bloomberg Terminal' aesthetic.

alignment_rules: Left-align data grids and numerical lists.
Dense compact spacing for executive scanability.

widgets_and_cards.classes: bg-white dark:bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 dark:border-zinc-800 rounded-sm shadow-none hover:border-zinc-300 dark:hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors

headers.classes: bg-white/95 dark:bg-zinc-950/95 backdrop-blur-sm border-b border-zinc-200 dark:border-zinc-800 z-50

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: hover:bg-zinc-100 dark:hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-zinc-900 dark:hover:text-zinc-50 transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out
motion_and_interactions.animations: Minimal micro-interactions. Staggered fade-ins for list items and table rows.

components.charts: Recharts with monochrome styling + functional semantic colors only (e.g., Red for Critical Risk, Amber for Overdue, Green for Ready).
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - optimal for dense dashboards.

specific_guidelines.cards: Avoid default Shadow-md. Use flat 1px borders. Apply 'p-4 or p-6' padding.
specific_guidelines.tables: High density. Use zebra striping (odd:bg-zinc-50 dark:odd:bg-zinc-900/50) for large sets. Right align numeric columns.
specific_guidelines.badges: Square edges, high contrast. Danger: bg-red-100 text-red-800 border border-red-200.
specific_guidelines.currency: Format all financials with Indian Rupee (₹) and standard Indian numbering system.

login_background.description: Abstract corporate architecture to serve as a structural background for the login page overlay.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. APCA guidelines preferred over WCAG 2.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement 'Control Room' density: Avoid excessive whitespace; prioritize data visibility above the fold.
Theme: Integrate next-themes for Light/Dark toggling, following the strict Zinc monochrome + semantic color mapping.
Data Visualizations: Render the CIO Dashboard with Recharts. Implement Radar chart for 8-axis sub-scores and 5x5 Grid/Heatmap for Risk visualization.
UI Overrides: All Shadcn primitives must be styled with rounded-sm and sharp borders (border-zinc-200/800) to enforce the high-contrast technical aesthetic. Remove default card shadows.
Use standard Indian locale (en-IN) formatting for all ₹ currency fields.
